title: 「The former / The latter」句型
titleZh: 「The former / The latter 句：前者／後者」
titleEn: Using The former and The latter for the first and second items

source.file: Sentence Structure 109 -「The former _ The latter 句：前者／後者」.pdf

formula: X + and/or + Y + ... . The former / The latter + verb + ...

formulas.formula: X + and/or + Y + ... . The former / The latter + verb + ...
X + and/or + Y + ... . Subject + verb + the former / the latter.

example: I could either get the money now or reinvest it. I chose the latter.
exampleZh: 我可以現在取走款項，或把款項再投資。我選擇了後者。

examples.en: I could either get the money now or reinvest it. I chose the latter.
examples.zh: 我可以現在取走款項，或把款項再投資。我選擇了後者。

meaning.zh: The former 指前面提及的兩個人、事物、選擇或概念中的第一個；the latter 指第二個。

rules.zh: The former 是前者，即兩項中的第一項；the latter 是後者，即第二項。
rules.en: The former means the first one; the latter means the second one.

rules.zh: 只有在剛好談及或比較兩個人、事物、選擇或概念時，才使用這個句型。
rules.en: Use this structure only when exactly two people, things, choices or ideas are being compared or discussed.

rules.zh: 不可省略 the；應寫 the former 和 the latter。
rules.en: Do not omit the: write the former and the latter, not simply former or latter.

rules.zh: 動詞必須配合所指代的人或事物。
rules.en: The verb must agree with the item being replaced.
examples: The former are easier to update.

rules.zh: 兩個項目的先後次序必須清楚；如讀者可能分不清，便應重複名詞。
rules.en: Keep the order clear. If the reader may not know which item came first or second, repeat the noun instead.

rules.zh: 本課的 the former 指兩者中的前者；a former teacher 表示前任老師，屬另一種用法。
rules.en: In this exercise, the former means the first of two; former + noun, as in a former teacher, is a different use.

benefits.zh: 不用重複兩個冗長名稱或概念，可以直接用前者和後者指代。
benefits.en: Instead of repeating two long names or ideas, you can refer to them as the former and the latter.

benefits.zh: 讀者可以迅速看出哪項描述屬於第一項，哪項屬於第二項。
benefits.en: The reader can quickly see which comment belongs to the first item and which belongs to the second.

benefits.zh: 它把新一句與前面兩項連接，使文章不顯得零碎或重複。
benefits.en: The structure links a new sentence to the two items mentioned before, so the writing does not feel broken or repetitive.

benefits.zh: 適合在作文、報告和簡報中討論兩個選擇或觀點及其優缺點。
benefits.en: It is useful for discussing two choices or viewpoints and their advantages, disadvantages or results.

benefits.zh: 提出兩個選項後，可以簡潔表明偏好或選擇，不必重複整個選項。
benefits.en: After naming two options, you can state a preference or choice briefly without repeating the whole option.

en: Rewrite each item using the former, the latter, or both. Replace the repeated words only when the reference is clear.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 the former、the latter 或兩者改寫每題。只有在指代清楚時，才以這個句型取代重複的字詞。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Tea and coffee were available. I chose tea.
questions.promptZh: 當時有茶和咖啡可供選擇。我選了茶。
questions.answer: Tea and coffee were available. I chose the former.
questions.answerZh: 當時有茶和咖啡可供選擇。我選了前者。
questions.highlight: Tea and coffee were available. I chose the former.

questions.prompt: Amy considered taking the bus or the train. She took the train.
questions.promptZh: 艾米考慮乘搭巴士或火車。她最後乘搭了火車。
questions.answer: Amy considered taking the bus or the train. She took the latter.
questions.answerZh: 艾米考慮乘搭巴士或火車。她最後選了後者。
questions.highlight: Amy considered taking the bus or the train. She took the latter.

questions.prompt: The red shirt and the blue shirt were on sale. The red shirt was cheaper.
questions.promptZh: 紅色恤衫和藍色恤衫正在減價。紅色恤衫較便宜。
questions.answer: The red shirt and the blue shirt were on sale. The former was cheaper.
questions.answerZh: 紅色恤衫和藍色恤衫正在減價。前者較便宜。
questions.highlight: The red shirt and the blue shirt were on sale. The former was cheaper.

questions.prompt: Ben could read a novel or watch a film. He decided to watch a film.
questions.promptZh: 本可以看小說或看電影。他決定看電影。
questions.answer: Ben could read a novel or watch a film. He chose the latter.
questions.answerZh: 本可以看小說或看電影。他選了後者。
questions.highlight: Ben could read a novel or watch a film. He chose the latter.

questions.prompt: We visited the museum and the park. I enjoyed the museum more.
questions.promptZh: 我們參觀了博物館和公園。我較喜歡博物館。
questions.answer: We visited the museum and the park. I enjoyed the former more.
questions.answerZh: 我們參觀了博物館和公園。我較喜歡前者。
questions.highlight: We visited the museum and the park. I enjoyed the former more.

questions.prompt: Mia bought apples and oranges. The oranges were sweeter.
questions.promptZh: 米婭買了蘋果和橙。橙比較甜。
questions.answer: Mia bought apples and oranges. The latter were sweeter.
questions.answerZh: 米婭買了蘋果和橙。後者比較甜。
questions.highlight: Mia bought apples and oranges. The latter were sweeter.

questions.prompt: David tried swimming and cycling. He found cycling easier.
questions.promptZh: 大衛嘗試了游泳和踏單車。他覺得踏單車較容易。
questions.answer: David tried swimming and cycling. He found the latter easier.
questions.answerZh: 大衛嘗試了游泳和踏單車。他覺得後者較容易。
questions.highlight: David tried swimming and cycling. He found the latter easier.

questions.prompt: A laptop and a tablet were on the desk. The laptop belonged to Leo.
questions.promptZh: 桌上放着一部手提電腦和一部平板電腦。手提電腦屬於里奧。
questions.answer: A laptop and a tablet were on the desk. The former belonged to Leo.
questions.answerZh: 桌上放着一部手提電腦和一部平板電腦。前者屬於里奧。
questions.highlight: A laptop and a tablet were on the desk. The former belonged to Leo.

questions.prompt: The morning class and the afternoon class were both full. The afternoon class ended later.
questions.promptZh: 上午班和下午班都已滿額。下午班較遲結束。
questions.answer: The morning class and the afternoon class were both full. The latter ended later.
questions.answerZh: 上午班和下午班都已滿額。後者較遲結束。
questions.highlight: The morning class and the afternoon class were both full. The latter ended later.

questions.prompt: Sarah could study at home or at the library. She chose to study at home.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉可以在家中或圖書館溫習。她選擇在家中溫習。
questions.answer: Sarah could study at home or at the library. She chose the former.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉可以在家中或圖書館溫習。她選了前者。
questions.highlight: Sarah could study at home or at the library. She chose the former.

questions.prompt: Which did Noah buy, the black bag or the brown bag? He bought the brown bag.
questions.promptZh: 諾亞買了哪一個，是黑色袋還是啡色袋？他買了啡色袋。
questions.answer: Which did Noah buy, the black bag or the brown bag? He bought the latter.

questions.prompt: Two routes lead to the beach: the forest path and the coastal road. The forest path is shorter.
questions.promptZh: 有兩條路可通往海灘：森林小徑和沿海道路。森林小徑較短。
questions.answer: Two routes lead to the beach: the forest path and the coastal road. The former is shorter.

questions.prompt: Chloe compared online shopping with shopping in a physical shop. She preferred online shopping.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊比較了網上購物和實體店購物。她較喜歡網上購物。

questions.answer: The soup and the salad were ready. The latter looked fresher.

questions.prompt: Ethan had two choices: apologise now or explain later. He decided to apologise now.
questions.promptZh: 伊森有兩個選擇：現在道歉或稍後解釋。他決定現在道歉。
questions.answer: Ethan had two choices: apologise now or explain later. He selected the former.
questions.answerZh: 伊森有兩個選擇：現在道歉或稍後解釋。他選了前者。

questions.prompt: Mr Chan discussed homework and class participation. He spent more time on class participation.
questions.promptZh: 陳先生討論了功課和課堂參與。他用了較多時間談課堂參與。
questions.answer: Mr Chan discussed homework and class participation. He spent more time on the latter.
questions.answerZh: 陳先生討論了功課和課堂參與。他用了較多時間談後者。

questions.prompt: I can call the customer service hotline or send an email. I prefer sending an email.
questions.promptZh: 我可以致電顧客服務熱線或發送電郵。我較喜歡發送電郵。
questions.answer: I can call the customer service hotline or send an email. I prefer the latter.

questions.prompt: The hotel offered a standard room and a family room. We booked the family room.
questions.promptZh: 酒店提供標準客房和家庭客房。我們預訂了家庭客房。
questions.answer: The hotel offered a standard room and a family room. We booked the latter.

questions.prompt: Why did Grace choose the stairs rather than the lift? She thought the stairs were faster.
questions.promptZh: 格蕾絲為甚麼選擇樓梯而不是升降機？她認為樓梯較快。
questions.answer: Why did Grace choose the stairs rather than the lift? She thought the former was faster.
questions.answerZh: 格蕾絲為甚麼選擇樓梯而不是升降機？她認為前者較快。

questions.prompt: The science club and the drama club meet on Fridays. The drama club has more members.
questions.promptZh: 科學學會和戲劇學會都在星期五活動。戲劇學會有較多會員。

questions.prompt: The cost-cutting proposal and the service-improvement proposal were discussed. The committee supported the service-improvement proposal.

questions.prompt: Karen spoke to the manager and the assistant manager. The manager answered her question.
questions.promptZh: 凱倫與經理和助理經理交談。經理解答了她的問題。
questions.answer: Karen spoke to the manager and the assistant manager. The former answered her question.

questions.prompt: The clinic offers telephone consultations and face-to-face consultations. Telephone consultations are useful for simple questions.

questions.prompt: Olivia learnt French and Spanish. She speaks French more confidently.

questions.answerZh: 奧莉花學習了法語和西班牙語。她說前者時較有信心。

questions.prompt: The team could defend carefully or attack early. The coach preferred the team to attack early.
questions.promptZh: 球隊可以小心防守或及早進攻。教練較希望球隊及早進攻。
questions.answer: The team could defend carefully or attack early. The coach preferred the latter.
questions.answerZh: 球隊可以小心防守或及早進攻。教練較喜歡後者。
questions.highlight: The team could defend carefully or attack early. The coach preferred the latter.

questions.prompt: Both the old bridge and the new bridge cross the river. The new bridge can carry heavier vehicles.
questions.promptZh: 舊橋和新橋都橫跨河流。新橋可以承載較重的車輛。
questions.answer: Both the old bridge and the new bridge cross the river. The latter can carry heavier vehicles.
questions.answerZh: 舊橋和新橋都橫跨河流。後者可以承載較重的車輛。
questions.highlight: Both the old bridge and the new bridge cross the river. The latter can carry heavier vehicles.

questions.prompt: Jason was offered a full-time position and a part-time position. He accepted the full-time position because it provided a steadier income.
questions.promptZh: 傑森獲提供一個全職職位和一個兼職職位。他接受了全職職位，因為收入較穩定。

questions.prompt: The bus and the taxi have different advantages. The bus is cheaper, but the taxi is faster.
questions.promptZh: 巴士和的士各有不同優點。巴士較便宜，但的士較快。
questions.answer: The bus and the taxi have different advantages. The former is cheaper, but the latter is faster.
questions.answerZh: 巴士和的士各有不同優點。前者較便宜，但後者較快。

questions.prompt: Paper books and e-books are both useful. Paper books do not need batteries, while e-books are easier to carry.
questions.promptZh: 紙本書和電子書都很有用。紙本書不需要電池，而電子書較容易攜帶。

questions.prompt: The morning team and the evening team completed the task. The morning team finished early, but the evening team made fewer mistakes.
questions.promptZh: 早班團隊和晚班團隊都完成了任務。早班團隊較早完成，但晚班團隊犯的錯誤較少。
questions.answer: The morning team and the evening team completed the task. The former finished early, but the latter made fewer mistakes.
questions.answerZh: 早班團隊和晚班團隊都完成了任務。前者較早完成，但後者犯的錯誤較少。
questions.highlight: The morning team and the evening team completed the task. The former finished early, but the latter made fewer mistakes.

questions.prompt: A public hospital and a private hospital were considered. The public hospital was farther away, whereas the private hospital had a shorter waiting time.
questions.promptZh: 大家考慮了公立醫院和私家醫院。公立醫院較遠，而私家醫院的輪候時間較短。
questions.answer: A public hospital and a private hospital were considered. The former was farther away, whereas the latter had a shorter waiting time.
questions.answerZh: 大家考慮了公立醫院和私家醫院。前者較遠，而後者的輪候時間較短。
questions.highlight: A public hospital and a private hospital were considered. The former was farther away, whereas the latter had a shorter waiting time.

questions.prompt: The teacher described group work and independent work. Group work encourages discussion, while independent work allows students to move at their own pace.
questions.promptZh: 老師介紹了小組學習和獨立學習。小組學習鼓勵討論，而獨立學習讓學生按自己的進度學習。
questions.answer: The teacher described group work and independent work. The former encourages discussion, while the latter allows students to move at their own pace.
questions.answerZh: 老師介紹了小組學習和獨立學習。前者鼓勵討論，而後者讓學生按自己的進度學習。
questions.highlight: The teacher described group work and independent work. The former encourages discussion, while the latter allows students to move at their own pace.

questions.prompt: The company tested two delivery methods: air freight and sea freight. Air freight was faster, but sea freight was less expensive.
questions.promptZh: 公司測試了兩種運送方式：空運和海運。空運較快，但海運較便宜。
questions.answer: The company tested two delivery methods: air freight and sea freight. The former was faster, but the latter was less expensive.
questions.answerZh: 公司測試了兩種運送方式：空運和海運。前者較快，但後者較便宜。
questions.highlight: The company tested two delivery methods: air freight and sea freight. The former was faster, but the latter was less expensive.

questions.prompt: The north entrance and the south entrance are open. The north entrance has a ramp, whereas the south entrance is closer to the car park.
questions.promptZh: 北面入口和南面入口均已開放。北面入口設有斜道，而南面入口較接近停車場。
questions.answer: The north entrance and the south entrance are open. The former has a ramp, whereas the latter is closer to the car park.
questions.answerZh: 北面入口和南面入口均已開放。前者設有斜道，而後者較接近停車場。
questions.highlight: The north entrance and the south entrance are open. The former has a ramp, whereas the latter is closer to the car park.

questions.prompt: The blue light and the green light show different conditions. The blue light means the machine is ready, while the green light means it is running.
questions.promptZh: 藍燈和綠燈表示不同狀態。藍燈表示機器已準備好，而綠燈表示機器正在運作。
questions.answer: The blue light and the green light show different conditions. The former means the machine is ready, while the latter means it is running.
questions.answerZh: 藍燈和綠燈表示不同狀態。前者表示機器已準備好，而後者表示機器正在運作。
questions.highlight: The blue light and the green light show different conditions. The former means the machine is ready, while the latter means it is running.

questions.prompt: The local supplier and the overseas supplier submitted quotations. The local supplier promised quicker delivery, but the overseas supplier offered a lower price.
questions.promptZh: 本地供應商和海外供應商提交了報價。本地供應商承諾較快送貨，但海外供應商提供較低價格。
questions.answer: The local supplier and the overseas supplier submitted quotations. The former promised quicker delivery, but the latter offered a lower price.
questions.answerZh: 本地供應商和海外供應商提交了報價。前者承諾較快送貨，但後者提供較低價格。
questions.highlight: The local supplier and the overseas supplier submitted quotations. The former promised quicker delivery, but the latter offered a lower price.

questions.prompt: The board considered a short-term savings plan and a long-term growth plan. It rejected the short-term savings plan and approved the long-term growth plan.
questions.promptZh: 董事會考慮了短期節省方案和長期增長方案。董事會否決了短期節省方案，並批准了長期增長方案。
questions.answer: The board considered a short-term savings plan and a long-term growth plan. It rejected the former and approved the latter.
questions.answerZh: 董事會考慮了短期節省方案和長期增長方案。董事會否決了前者，並批准了後者。
questions.highlight: The board considered a short-term savings plan and a long-term growth plan. It rejected the former and approved the latter.

questions.prompt: Working from home and working in an office can both be effective. Working from home offers flexibility, while working in an office makes face-to-face teamwork easier.
questions.promptZh: 在家工作和在辦公室工作都可以有效。在家工作較有彈性，而在辦公室工作令面對面合作更容易。
questions.answer: Working from home and working in an office can both be effective. The former offers flexibility, while the latter makes face-to-face teamwork easier.
questions.answerZh: 在家工作和在辦公室工作都可以有效。前者較有彈性，而後者令面對面合作更容易。
questions.highlight: Working from home and working in an office can both be effective. The former offers flexibility, while the latter makes face-to-face teamwork easier.

questions.prompt: The article presents stricter rules and better public education as possible solutions. The writer believes better public education will have a longer-lasting effect.
questions.promptZh: 文章提出更嚴格的規則和更完善的公眾教育作為可能的解決方法。作者認為更完善的公眾教育會帶來較持久的效果。
questions.answer: The article presents stricter rules and better public education as possible solutions. The writer believes the latter will have a longer-lasting effect.
questions.answerZh: 文章提出更嚴格的規則和更完善的公眾教育作為可能的解決方法。作者認為後者會帶來較持久的效果。
questions.highlight: The article presents stricter rules and better public education as possible solutions. The writer believes the latter will have a longer-lasting effect.

questions.prompt: The council considered building a new car park and improving public transport. Building a new car park would help drivers, but improving public transport would benefit more residents.
questions.promptZh: 議會考慮興建新停車場和改善公共交通。興建新停車場會幫助駕駛者，但改善公共交通會令更多居民受惠。
questions.answer: The council considered building a new car park and improving public transport. The former would help drivers, but the latter would benefit more residents.
questions.answerZh: 議會考慮興建新停車場和改善公共交通。前者會幫助駕駛者，但後者會令更多居民受惠。
questions.highlight: The council considered building a new car park and improving public transport. The former would help drivers, but the latter would benefit more residents.

questions.prompt: The school can reduce class sizes or hire more teaching assistants. Reducing class sizes is more expensive, but hiring more teaching assistants can be done sooner.
questions.promptZh: 學校可以縮小班級人數或增聘教學助理。縮小班級人數的成本較高，但增聘教學助理可以更快完成。
questions.answer: The school can reduce class sizes or hire more teaching assistants. The former is more expensive, but the latter can be done sooner.
questions.answerZh: 學校可以縮小班級人數或增聘教學助理。前者的成本較高，但後者可以更快完成。
questions.highlight: The school can reduce class sizes or hire more teaching assistants. The former is more expensive, but the latter can be done sooner.

questions.prompt: The report compares prevention with treatment. Prevention can reduce future cases, whereas treatment helps people who are already ill.
questions.promptZh: 報告比較預防和治療。預防可以減少日後的病例，而治療則幫助已經患病的人。
questions.answer: The report compares prevention with treatment. The former can reduce future cases, whereas the latter helps people who are already ill.
questions.answerZh: 報告比較預防和治療。前者可以減少日後的病例，而後者則幫助已經患病的人。
questions.highlight: The report compares prevention with treatment. The former can reduce future cases, whereas the latter helps people who are already ill.

questions.prompt: Two groups responded differently to the change: younger workers and older workers. Younger workers adapted quickly, but older workers asked for more training.
questions.promptZh: 兩個群組對轉變有不同反應：較年輕的員工和年長員工。較年輕的員工很快適應，但年長員工要求更多培訓。
questions.answer: Two groups responded differently to the change: younger workers and older workers. The former adapted quickly, but the latter asked for more training.
questions.answerZh: 兩個群組對轉變有不同反應：較年輕的員工和年長員工。前者很快適應，但後者要求更多培訓。
questions.highlight: Two groups responded differently to the change: younger workers and older workers. The former adapted quickly, but the latter asked for more training.

questions.prompt: The university offered scholarships to local students and exchange students. Local students received 40 scholarships, while exchange students received 20.
questions.promptZh: 大學向本地學生和交流生提供獎學金。本地學生獲得四十份獎學金，而交流生獲得二十份。
questions.answer: The university offered scholarships to local students and exchange students. The former received 40 scholarships, while the latter received 20.
questions.answerZh: 大學向本地學生和交流生提供獎學金。前者獲得四十份獎學金，而後者獲得二十份。
questions.highlight: The university offered scholarships to local students and exchange students. The former received 40 scholarships, while the latter received 20.

questions.prompt: The debate centred on economic growth and environmental protection. Economic growth was linked to job creation, whereas environmental protection was linked to long-term sustainability.
questions.promptZh: 辯論集中於經濟增長和環境保護。經濟增長與創造職位有關，而環境保護則與長遠可持續發展有關。
questions.answer: The debate centred on economic growth and environmental protection. The former was linked to job creation, whereas the latter was linked to long-term sustainability.
questions.answerZh: 辯論集中於經濟增長和環境保護。前者與創造職位有關，而後者則與長遠可持續發展有關。
questions.highlight: The debate centred on economic growth and environmental protection. The former was linked to job creation, whereas the latter was linked to long-term sustainability.

questions.prompt: The policy offers immediate financial relief and long-term skills training. Immediate financial relief helps families now, while long-term skills training may improve future employment.
questions.promptZh: 政策提供即時經濟援助和長期技能培訓。即時經濟援助目前可幫助家庭，而長期技能培訓可能改善日後的就業情況。
questions.answer: The policy offers immediate financial relief and long-term skills training. The former helps families now, while the latter may improve future employment.
questions.answerZh: 政策提供即時經濟援助和長期技能培訓。前者目前可幫助家庭，而後者可能改善日後的就業情況。
questions.highlight: The policy offers immediate financial relief and long-term skills training. The former helps families now, while the latter may improve future employment.

questions.prompt: The committee had to choose between expanding the existing hospital and building a new one outside the town centre. Expanding the existing hospital would be quicker, but building a new hospital would create more space.
questions.promptZh: 委員會必須在擴建現有醫院和在市中心外興建新醫院之間作出選擇。擴建現有醫院會較快，但興建新醫院會提供更多空間。
questions.answer: The committee had to choose between expanding the existing hospital and building a new one outside the town centre. The former would be quicker, but the latter would create more space.
questions.answerZh: 委員會必須在擴建現有醫院和在市中心外興建新醫院之間作出選擇。前者會較快，但後者會提供更多空間。
questions.highlight: The committee had to choose between expanding the existing hospital and building a new one outside the town centre. The former would be quicker, but the latter would create more space.
